title: Generated status and blocked reports misclassify review and blocked tasks
description: generateStatus puts non-ready tasks, including review and explicitly blocked tasks, under Waiting (blocked by dependencies). generateBlocked also includes review tasks because isActionable returns false. Affected: src/core/generate.ts. Fix by splitting dependency-blocked, marked blocked, review, and non-ready/todo buckets explicitly.
resolution: Fixed by adding separate Review and Marked blocked report sections and limiting dependency-waiting output to tasks with unmet dependencies. blocked.md no longer includes review or in-progress tasks. Added report bucket regression tests.
